word: H7683 - שָׁגַג - shâgag - shaw-gag' - [idiom] also for that

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁגג

Transliteration: shâgag

Phonetic: shaw-gag'

BDB Definition:

  1. to go astray, err, commit sin or error
    1. (Qal)
      1. to err (mentally)
      2. to sin (ignorantly or inadvertently)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2324

Part(s) of speech: Verb
